title: Lahti, Päijät-Häme — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Lahti, Päijät-Häme: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Lahti is a city in Päijät-Häme with a population of 120,000. A city on the shore of Lake Vesijärvi, known for its ski jumping hills, design district, and environmental initiatives.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
